creator: yuripv@FreeBSD.org
text: FWIW, I just tried booting FreeBSD-14.0-CURRENT-i386-20230706-884eaacd24bd-263985-disc1.iso (latest at the moment) in VirtualBox 7.0.8 running on Windows 11 host (host CPU is i9-11900K), no issues seen.  The VM has 2048MB of RAM and USB controllers removed, everything else is default.
